creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I tried to build the port using poudriere and failed with the following message:


====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: share/locale/ar/LC_MESSAGES/zathura.mo
Error: Orphaned: share/zsh/site-functions/_zathura
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.


Maybe pkg-plist needs some updates?
